title: Harden selected pack commands
summary: Makes pack list, describe, validate, and selected namespace resolution use the effective hosted-pack runtime view and return structured failures for stale authored registry entries.
scope_items: Route selected pack command resolution through effective hosted-pack discovery instead of authored-registry-only lookups.
Return structured pack command errors when selected authored registry entries point at missing manifests or stale donor paths.
done_when_items: Pack list, describe, and validate no longer fail purely because a consuming repository copied donor registry entries that do not match its local pack set.
Selected top-level pack namespace discovery can expose discovered packs without importing unrelated broken packs.
